title: MEDICAID - 211info
text: EUGENE OFFICE MEDICAID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and assistance with applying for Medicaid. 1015 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 682-4038 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-4038 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Medicaid Information/Counseling * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid Information/Counseling * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - OREGON MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SNAP UTILITIES - SENIOR CONNECTIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE OFFICE
